question_text: What is the definition of density?

options.label: A
options.text: The mass of an object divided by its volume

options.label: B
options.text: The weight of an object divided by its height

options.label: C
options.text: The volume of an object divided by its mass

explanation: Density is a measure of how much mass is packed into a certain volume. It tells us how tightly packed the particles of a substance are.
